name: Sweet Pickled Cherry Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 Lemons (Use only the juice and grated zest)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and prick each one several times with the tines of a fork.
2. Dissolve the sugar in the water, bring to a boil and boil rapidly for 5 minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Remove the tomatoes from the syrup.
5. To the remaining syrup, add the grated zest and juice of the lemons, as well as the salt. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Return the tomatoes to the simmered syrup and continue cooking for about 30 more minutes, or until the syrup thickens and the tomatoes become transparent.
7. Transfer the pickled cherry tomatoes into hot jars and seal them properly.
Makes about 6 pints.
